# `!self_locate`

**Category:** control

Introspect the target's virtualization environment (lxc/qemu/pod/physical) and workload ID, saving the result as a host variable map.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `save` | string | yes | Variable name under which the detection result map is stored. |
| `api_host` | string | no | Proxmox API host URL (reserved for future use). |
| `api_token_id` | string | no | Proxmox API token ID (reserved for future use). |
| `api_token_secret` | string | no | Proxmox API token secret (reserved for future use). |

## Examples

```yaml
- !self_locate
  save: location
```
